task: Log in to saucedemo.com with the user standard_user and password secret_sauce. Add three products to the cart: the Sauce Labs Backpack, the Sauce Labs Bike Light and the Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt. Open the cart, start the checkout, fill in first name João, last name Silva and ZIP code 01310-100, continue, finish the purchase and verify that the order-completed message appears.
